prompt: A space station docking platform with metallic grid floor panels, some sections transparent revealing Earth's blue glow below. A large silver spacecraft is docked on the right side. Robotic loading arms extend from the platform structure. The curved edge of the station frames a starfield and Earth in the background. Industrial sci-fi lighting with orange guide strips on the floor. Further ahead, a cargo airlock with a heavy reinforced door and warning stripes connects to the main station hub. Behind the viewer, a control tower with panoramic windows rises above the platform, and an automated supply shuttle is docked at a secondary bay with fuel hoses attached. First-person viewer. First-person view standing on the docking platform looking forward across the transparent floor panels toward the docked spacecraft and Earth below. No held objects.

tracking_object.desc: robotic loading arm on the right side

scene_adherence.visible_part: A space station docking platform has metallic grid floor panels, some sections of which are transparent revealing Earth's blue glow below. A large silver spacecraft is docked on the right side. Robotic loading arms extend from the platform structure. The curved edge of the station frames a starfield and Earth in the background. Industrial sci-fi lighting with orange guide strips on the floor is present in the scene.
scene_adherence.offscreen_part: Further ahead, a cargo airlock with a heavy reinforced door and warning stripes connects to the main station hub. Behind the viewer, a control tower with panoramic windows rises above the platform, and an automated supply shuttle is docked at a secondary bay with fuel hoses attached.
